name: codex-accounts-manager
description: Manage multiple Codex accounts in VS Code, inspect quota, and switch the active global auth.json.

codexAccounts.codexAppRestartMode.markdownDescription: How to handle Codex App restart when switching accounts and the desktop app is already running. `auto` restarts it automatically, `manual` asks you to click restart each time.

codexAccounts.codexAppRestartEnabled.markdownDescription: Whether codex-tools should manage Codex App when switching accounts. Turn this off to skip restart prompts and app handling entirely.

codexAccounts.displayLanguage.markdownDescription: Language used by codex-tools. `auto` follows the current VS Code display language. Dashboard, details, and core notifications use localized copy when available and fall back to English for any missing edge-case strings.

codexAccounts.autoRefreshMinutes.markdownDescription: Automatically refresh saved account quotas every N minutes. Set to `0` to disable.

codexAccounts.autoSwitchEnabled.markdownDescription: Automatically switch away from the active account when its quota falls below the configured hourly or weekly threshold.

codexAccounts.autoSwitchHourlyThreshold.markdownDescription: Automatic account switching threshold for the 5-hour quota. Switching is triggered when the active account drops to or below this percentage.

codexAccounts.autoSwitchWeeklyThreshold.markdownDescription: Automatic account switching threshold for the weekly quota. Switching is triggered when the active account drops to or below this percentage.

codexAccounts.codexAppPath.markdownDescription: Optional custom path to the Codex desktop app. If empty, the extension uses built-in platform-specific detection.

codexAccounts.showCodeReviewQuota.markdownDescription: Show Code Review quota in the dashboard.

codexAccounts.quotaWarningEnabled.markdownDescription: Show a warning notification when the active account quota drops below the configured threshold.

codexAccounts.quotaWarningThreshold.markdownDescription: Quota warning threshold percentage for the active account.

codexAccounts.quotaGreenThreshold.markdownDescription: Quota percentage at or above this value is shown in green.

codexAccounts.quotaYellowThreshold.markdownDescription: Quota percentage at or above this value is shown in yellow. Values below this threshold are shown in red.

codexAccounts.debugNetwork.markdownDescription: Enable sanitized network debug logs for codex-tools requests in the `Codex Accounts Network` output channel.

commands.title: Codex Accounts: Add Account via OAuth

scripts.compile: npm run typecheck:webview && npm run build:webview && tsc -p ./
